approved_exception_note: Approved cross-lane exception for `src/qual/engine/tools/excerpt_tools.py` to keep the engine-facing `fetch_excerpt()` path compatible with retrieval-owned `fts_*` excerpt IDs required by the FTS-first MVP.
kickoff_budget_note: Classified as high-risk per AGENTS.md because the branch includes one engine-owned file outside the retrieval lane. Work stayed within the 4-task high-risk budget, and all required local gates were rerun on 2026-03-20 before handoff.
roadmap_items: Milestone 4: Retrieval Layer -> FTS-first ingestion/index path for context/vault documents
Milestone 4: Retrieval Layer -> Retrieval orchestration in engine before drafting/diff generation
Milestone 4: Retrieval Layer -> Source-attribution model for retrieved chunks
Milestone 2: Test Hardening -> Add focused unit coverage for core behaviors
scope_goal: Build the FTS-first retrieval MVP in retrieval-owned paths, plus the minimal engine-facing compatibility shim needed so engine excerpt flows can resolve retrieval-backed `fts_*` IDs.
tasks_completed: Returned deterministic FTS excerpt IDs and retrieval-backed `fetch_excerpt()` support so engine excerpt tooling can resolve `fts_*` IDs.
Preserved `doc_hits` relevance order so document-level ranking matches the top-ranked underlying excerpt hit.
Added focused unit coverage for both document ranking order and engine-facing FTS excerpt fetch behavior.
Completed the handoff metadata required by INTEGRATION.md with explicit high-risk ownership, exception, and MVP alignment notes for the retrieval work plus the engine-facing compatibility shim.
